title: slice.end
description: Appended to the Epic ledger by the legacy single-delivery slice executor design when a Delivery-Slicing slice finishes — the single-delivery analogue of story.dispatch.end. A `done` outcome is what the slice-map checkpoint flips `slices[id].status` to before the walk advances. Introduced INERT in Epic #4475 M4-A; current /deliver Story delivery uses helpers/deliver-story instead.
